name: ElromEvedElElyon/claw-mcp-toolkit
description: Multi-purpose MCP toolkit with 26 tools across 5 modules — crypto (prices, trending, Fear & Greed), web (fetch, DNS, SSL, SEO), social (tweet gen, threads, content calendar), finance (stocks, forex, portfolio, invoices), and productivity (pomodoro, tasks, notes, reminders). Zero API keys, zero config. MIT license.
